title: A piece of clothing I wear often
summary: Describe one piece of clothing you wear often — what it is, where it is from, and why you like it.
topic: A piece of clothing I wear often
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about one piece of clothing you wear often. Say what it is, where it is from, and why you like it. Use present simple.
hintStarters: I have a favourite piece of clothing. It is…
I wear it almost every… because…
sampleText: I have a favourite piece of clothing. It is a wool scarf from Edinburgh. I bought it at a small market stall near the castle two years ago. The scarf is dark grey and very thick. It is also very soft. I wear it almost every day in winter because the cold wind is very strong in Edinburgh. I wrap the scarf around my neck when I go outside. It keeps my neck and face warm. The scarf is long, so I fold it twice. I also like the colour because it goes with all my coats. My friend says the scarf looks good on me. I always keep it near the front door so I do not forget it. When I put it on, I feel ready for the cold weather. This scarf is simple but I love it very much.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: wrap the scarf around my neck
keeps my neck and face warm

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: hợp với tất cả áo khoác của tôi

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for habits and preferences
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn để nói về thói quen và sở thích: 'I wear it almost every day', 'I love it very much'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for habits and preferences, as in 'I wear it almost every day' and 'I love it very much'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Adjective order
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Khi dùng nhiều tính từ, thứ tự thông thường là: kích thước → màu sắc → chất liệu: 'a thick dark grey wool scarf'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: When using more than one adjective, the usual order is size → colour → material, e.g. 'a thick dark grey wool scarf'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một món quần áo yêu thích. Đó là một chiếc khăn quàng len từ Edinburgh. Tôi mua nó ở một quầy hàng nhỏ gần lâu đài cách đây hai năm. Khăn màu xám đậm và rất dày. Nó cũng rất mềm. Tôi đeo nó gần như mỗi ngày vào mùa đông vì gió lạnh rất mạnh ở Edinburgh. Tôi quấn khăn quanh cổ khi ra ngoài. Nó giữ ấm cổ và mặt tôi. Khăn dài nên tôi gấp đôi lại. Tôi cũng thích màu sắc vì nó hợp với tất cả áo khoác của tôi. Bạn tôi nói chiếc khăn trông đẹp trên người tôi. Tôi luôn để nó gần cửa trước để không quên. Khi đeo vào, tôi cảm thấy sẵn sàng đối mặt với thời tiết lạnh. Chiếc khăn đơn giản nhưng tôi yêu nó rất nhiều.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where did the writer buy the scarf?
options: At a market stall near the castle
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I bought it at a small market stall near the castle'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for where the scarf was purchased.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The scarf is dark grey'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the adjective that describes the scarf's colour.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer wear the scarf every day in winter?
options: Because the cold wind is very strong
Because friends gave it as a gift
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'the cold wind is very strong in Edinburgh'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason linked to the weather.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence is correct in the present simple?
options: She wear a scarf every day.
She wears a scarf every day.
She is wearing a scarf every day.
She wore a scarf every day.
I wear it because is warm.
I wear it because it is warm.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'because' introduces a complete clause with a subject and verb.
mcQuestions.hint: The clause after 'because' needs a subject and verb.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do with the scarf before going out?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I wrap the scarf around my neck when I go outside'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the action the writer does with the scarf.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which option correctly uses an adjective to describe clothing?
options: A scarf thick and grey wool.
mcQuestions.explanation: Adjectives come before the noun: 'a thick, grey wool scarf'.
mcQuestions.hint: Adjectives go before the noun they describe.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer like the colour of the scarf?
options: It is very bright and eye-catching.
It matches the colour of the castle.
It goes with all the writer's coats.
It is the writer's favourite colour since childhood.
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I like the colour because it goes with all my coats'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the reason related to the writer's other clothes.

options: It is very soft also very.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'also' goes after the verb 'be': 'It is also very soft'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where does the writer keep the scarf at home?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I always keep it near the front door'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the location mentioned at the end of the text.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people sometimes feel strongly attached to clothing they bought on a trip? What does that object remind them of?
